message: Operation 'listChannels' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary 'Channel Collection' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description is verbose and contains grammatical errors ('there' should be 'their'). Reorganized to clarify the filtering mechanism, incremental update capability, and the conditional EPG number exposure. Improved clarity for AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description:
If you are interested in a list of channels that have had there schedule updated you can filter by the following query params.
 - scheduleStart
 - scheduleEnd
 - scheduleUpdatedSince

adding these query params will filter the channel collection to only return channels that have been updated within the given range, updatedSince stores the state of your previous call.

Example Usage: Every 10 minutes get me the channels that have updated schedules for the next 2 weeks.

/channel?platform={uuid}&scheduleStart={today}&scheduleEnd={today + 2 weeks}&updatedSince={10 minutes ago}

Also please note epg numbers are only exposed when a platform and region are passed to the query.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve channels with optional schedule filters
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a collection of channels, optionally filtered by schedule update time range. Supports incremental updates via the scheduleUpdatedSince parameter to track changes since the last call. Query parameters: scheduleStart (filter start date), scheduleEnd (filter end date), scheduleUpdatedSince (returns only channels updated after this timestamp). Note: EPG numbers are only included in the response when both platform and region parameters are provided. Returns an array of channel objects matching the filter criteria.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Channel Collection' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description is verbose and contains grammatical errors ('there' should be 'their'). Reorganized to clarify the filtering mechanism, incremental update capability, and the conditional EPG number exposure. Improved clarity for AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.
